title: Grilled Maple Glazed Herbed Salmon with Pineapple Salsa
instructions:
In a medium bowl combine all the salsa ingredients and set aside.
Mix the paprika, chili powder, salt and sugar together in a small bowl.
Place the salmon in a baking dish and coat with the spice mixture. Cook on an oiled grill, for 6-8 minutes or until almost done; brush with the maple syrup and continue cooking until done.
Remove the salmon from the grill and serve with the salsa as a garnish. Serve the remaining salsa in a bowl for additional garnish if desired.
